review.verdict: Right pick when accuracy actually matters; wrong pick when you just need cheap real-time MT.
review.best_for: Enterprises localizing legal, medical or marketing content where errors are costly
review.not_for: Apps translating high-volume UGC where DeepL or Google MT at API speed suffice
